narrative.summary: #28 on North America's 50 Best Bars 2025. Apothecary-themed cocktail bar in Chinatown. TCM-inspired cocktails, exotic spices, intimate space. Industry crowd favourite. Craft + intention personified. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on Keefer Street in the heart of Chinatown, walking into a narrow room that feels more opium den than cocktail bar—dark lacquered wood, apothecary bottles backlit behind the bar, and enough moody red lighting to make everyone look like they have a secret. The space holds maybe thirty people comfortably, bar seats on one side, low banquettes on the other, with vintage Chinese medicine cabinets turned into décor. It's the kind of place where bartenders know the industry regulars by drink order.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: This is a cocktail bar, not a kitchen, so you're here for drinks built around Traditional Chinese Medicine principles—ginseng, five-spice, Sichuan peppercorn, things that sound medicinal but taste revelatory. The Durian Colada has a cult following (yes, durian), and recent menus have featured the Cold Turkey, Snowbird, Fantasy Island, and Cool As—all TCM-riff cocktails with exotic spices and unexpected textures. Expect $16-20 per drink, and expect them to be worth the deliberation. The bar stocks Northern Keep vodka, which regulars swear makes one of the best vodka sodas in the city.

blocks.title: Go When
blocks.body: This is a late-night, post-dinner, I-want-one-perfect-drink kind of place—ideally midweek when the industry crowd settles in and the bartenders have time to talk you through the menu. Go when you want intention, not volume.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Update 10/2/2025: Great experience here with Hugo and the rest of your amazing staff. Confession time: i have fallen HARD for your Durian Colada (6/5) and am chuffed! Pleased... delighted that its gonna be returning with the Alumni perscriptions on the menu. I have a mental rolladex of good Pina Coladas in town and this was a standout.

Also... i am very impressed with Northern Keep as a well Vodka... such a clean, flavourful profile in a Vodka soda and one of the best vodka sodas in town 🌈🌈🌈✨️
_____

Update 7/25/2025: nice experience here today!! I tried the Cold Turkey and had a Snowbird (both terrific!!!) From Virginia... great vibe here today. 🍸

---
Great drinks & service here from Asya!! Especially like the Fantasy Island and Cool As 😎 👌

Hey, one more thing--- you guys were so amazing and sweet to my mom in January when she visited (she was overdue for a hip surgery--- you guys were understanding and sweet and accommodating 💕  Thank you 💕 )"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Our last stop for the night is Chinese Dim Sum fusion....with the merge being Dum Sum and Hip Funk!   Traditional Dim Sum combined with modern drinks and DJ Dance, a nice glass of House Red and Shrimp Dumplings finished our night strong.   They even took care of our gluten-free needs as one of our party is celiac.  Thank you Keefer Bar!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Strong drink that are well made. Got the vodka based ones and all were excellent.

Very red and dark. Felt like an underground venue with Chinese letters and acupuncture pictures everywhere.

Fun vibes here and excellent drinks."
